TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == caheni == Śõ†Ś§ĖÁČ©ŚĹĪťüŅŤÄĆÁôľÁôĘ i pilangecan caheni sa ku tipus. siwkay nu caheni i banges nu mita, nay nu ihekalay a tuutuud saca cilekay macalenged sanay. izaw ku namaky banges , izaw ku namakay balucu'. maydih mikuskus kita. anu mangaleb mikuskus, maduka' tuway. anu macaheni ku kidu, pililuci, pasapayui, akamikuskus, alaw maduka', maizang. tinaku a kamu i pilangecan caheni sa ku tipus. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Itch is a sensation that causes the desire or reflex to scratch. Itch has resisted many attempts to classify it as any one type of sensory experience. Modern science has shown that itch has many similarities to pain, and while both are unpleasant sensory experiences, their behavioral response patterns are different. Pain creates a withdrawal reflex, whereas itch leads to a scratch reflex.
S.PHON: == ¶ańß…ôni == ******** i pir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶an ¶ańß…ôni sa ku tipus. siwkaj nu ¶ańß…ôni i baŇč…ôs nu mita, naj nu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tuutuud sa ¶a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ma ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôd sanaj. izaw ku namakj baŇč…ôs , izaw ku namakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. majdińß mikuskus kita. anu maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb mikuskus, maduka Ē~ ° tuwaj. anu ma ¶ańß…ôni ku kidu, pir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶i, pasapajui, akamikuskus, ar~…ĺaw maduka Ē~ °, maizaŇč. tinaku a kamu i pir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶an ¶ańß…ôni sa ku tipus. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika it ¶ńß is a s…ônsation tńßat ¶aus…ôs tńß…ô d…ôsir…ô or r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô* to s ¶rat ¶ńß. it ¶ńß ńßas r…ôsist…ôd manj att…ômpts to ¶r~…ĺassifj it as anj on…ô tjp…ô of s…ônsorj …ô*p…ôri…ôn ¶…ô. mod…ôrn s ¶i…ôn ¶…ô ńßas sńßown tńßat it ¶ńß ńßas manj simir~…ĺariti…ôs to pain, and wńßir~…ĺ…ô botńß ar…ô unpr~…ĺ…ôasant s…ônsorj …ô*p…ôri…ôn ¶…ôs, tńß…ôir b…ôńßa*iorar~…ĺ r…ôspons…ô patt…ôrns ar…ô diff…ôr…ônt. pain ¶r…ôat…ôs a witńßdrawar~…ĺ r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô*, wńß…ôr…ôas it ¶ńß r~…ĺ…ôads to a s ¶rat ¶ńß r…ôfr~…ĺ…ô*.
S.FORM: == caheni == Śõ†Ś§ĖÁČ©ŚĹĪťüŅŤÄĆÁôľÁôĘ i pilangecan caheni sa ku tipus. siwkay nu caheni i banges nu mita, nay nu ihekalay a tuutuud saca cilekay macalenged sanay. izaw ku namaky banges , izaw ku namakay balucu'. maydih mikuskus kita. anu mangaleb mikuskus, maduka' tuway. anu macaheni ku kidu, pililuci, pasapayui, akamikuskus, alaw maduka', maizang. tinaku a kamu i pilangecan caheni sa ku tipus. u sulit nu Hulam atu Amilika Itch is a sensation that causes the desire or reflex to scratch. Itch has resisted many attempts to classify it as any one type of sensory experience. Modern science has shown that itch has many similarities to pain, and while both are unpleasant sensory experiences, their behavioral response patterns are different. Pain creates a withdrawal reflex, whereas itch leads to a scratch reflex.
